packs.name: Filling Kernels qq=50
packs.description: Pre-computed K^ref Dehn filling kernels at qq=50. 75 slopes: coprime (P,Q) with |P|≤10, Q≤10. Computed with v0.4 (IS chain fix included).

packs.name: Iʳᵉʳ m-series qq=20
packs.description: Pre-computed I^ref for all 410 census manifolds m003–m412 at qq=20. Grid: m ∈ [−20,20], e ∈ [−20,20] (half-integer steps). Enables near-instant Dehn filling for the full SnapPy m-series census.
